description: The RecordSyncStatus component reports the current status of syncing items like worlds, avatars, settings, and user generated content when present in the user space world where the dash is.

fields.RecordQueueCount: How many items are left in the queue of items to Sync from the user's machine to the cloud.
fields.AssetVariantQueueCount: How many asset variants are left to upload for the items being uploaded to the cloud.
fields.CurrentTaskProgress: How far along the Asset uploader is to uploading the current item.
fields.LastError: The last error given by the cloud item uploader process.
fields.StatusMessage: The status message for the item uploader process.
fields.FullySyncedColor: The color the UI should be if it is fully done syncing.
fields.ErrorColor: The color the UI should be if there was an error (UH OH!!! Stuck Sync!!!)
fields.SyncingRecordsColor: The color the UI should be when the item uploader task is syncing Record items.
fields.UploadingAssetVariantsColor: The color the UI should be when the item uploader is uploading Asset variants for things like textures or skyboxes.
